Larry Nance Jr..note: Projected 0 minutes / only brief garbage-time postseason appearances; do not materially adjust core rotation.

OG Anunoby.note: Full participant Monday; expected to play. Monitor hamstring conditioning but model assumes starting role.

NYK.read: NYK owns cleaner late-game structure and halfcourt closer profile. Avoid overweighting prior blowout; use close-game mechanics as primary input.

CLE.read: CLE is volatile but live-over viable when creation quality remains intact. Mitchell takeover tail active. Harden usage drag remains a risk if efficiency and turnover profile deteriorate.

simulation_output_pre_tip.model_confidence: medium-low pre-tip; better for live validation than pregame full strike

edge_board.rationale: Rolling-window profile respects NYK closer edge but +7.5 captures hook/margin-band volatility and Mitchell takeover tail.
Projection median below line, but Brunson closeout and home whistle can push late scoring. Requires live pace/FTA validation.
Do not buy pregame unless creation quality validates. Best live signal is strong Mitchell usage + paint touches + free throw path despite early misses.

entry_priority: Wait for first 6-8 minutes before team-total strike.
For CLE overs, require creation > finishing: rim pressure, FT access, assist quality, and non-toxic Harden possessions.
For NYK side/spread, prioritize late 3Q/4Q if within two possessions and Brunson is controlling touches.
Avoid full-game total unless pace and FTA path clearly diverge from 217.5 baseline.
kill_switches: If Harden has high-usage inefficient possessions plus live-ball turnovers, downgrade CLE TT overs.
If OG hamstring limits defensive mobility or minutes, lift CLE wing creation and downgrade NYK defensive rating.
If NYK gets early bonus/FTA advantage, cancel NYK TT under lean.

pre_tip_recommendation.best_watch: CLE +7.5 if available; otherwise wait live
pre_tip_recommendation.live_strike_zone: CLE team total over only after process validation; NYK late-game spread/ML windows if close
